title: Returning an object of the wrong type from a static function of a parameterized class

features.name: parameterized class static function returning parameterized type
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class with a static member function that returns the parameterized class type

features.name: static function call on parameterized class with explicit type parameter
features.description: Code should include calling a static function of a parameterized class using explicit type parameter syntax Class#(param)::function()

features.name: type_this workaround for parameterized class static function
features.description: Code should include using type(this) as return type in a static function of a parameterized class as a workaround for type mismatches
